title: Scheduled workflows failing to trigger
symptom: Scheduled workflows are not being triggered as expected, leading to missed executions.
root_cause: When N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED is set to true without proper worker configuration, scheduled workflows may not trigger correctly due to resource constraints and instability in the execution environment.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED to false
Verify that the scheduling configuration is correct
Monitor the system for any further issues
agent_instruction: Disable N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED and check the scheduling configuration.
